creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Borja Marcos from comment #7)
> The number grows *only* when the version 1.7.4 nfcapd/sfcapd daemons are running.

Perhaps you would rather submit a new PR reporting the leak for net-mgmt/nfdump? The original PR here refers to net/bird2 and seems to be only loosely related to the problems you have encountered.
